blended.narrative: Schweitzer is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,208 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.5" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 43°F.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 7" over the past week. Current depth: 48".
